metadata.description: Composio plugins for Claude Code — connect 250+ apps and tools via MCP and CLI.

plugins.name: composio-mcp
plugins.description: Composio MCP server — gives Claude access to 250+ app integrations (GitHub, Slack, Notion, etc.) via the Model Context Protocol.

plugins.name: composio-cli
plugins.description: Composio CLI skills — find tools, connect accounts, execute actions, and manage integrations from Claude Code.
